title: Sintel
description: A lonely young woman named Sintel rescues a baby dragon she names Scales. But when Scales is snatched away by an adult dragon, Sintel begins a desperate, epic quest to find her companion.

title: Tears of Steel
description: Set in a dystopian future, a group of scientists in Rotterdam try to rescue the world from destructive robots using a portal to the past. A visually stunning sci-fi short film.

title: Big Buck Bunny
description: A large and lovable rabbit deals with three bullying rodents who ruin his day and harass his forest friends. A classic animated comedy of sweet revenge.

title: Elephant's Dream
description: A surreal animated tale of two characters, Proog and Emo, who explore a giant, strange, and chaotic machine world. It is the world's first open movie project.

title: For Bigger Blazes
description: An action-filled short demonstration showcasing chromecast capabilities with extreme sporting events, showcasing high-speed climbing, base jumping, and stunts.
